name: Shrimp with Cornmeal Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix together the Poblano Chiles, diced tomatoes, quartered onion, minced garlic, white wine, sugar, salt, and red pepper flakes.
2. Stir in the sour cream until well combined.
3. Add the cooked shrimp to the mixture and toss gently to coat.
4. Shape the mixture into small pancakes using a spoon or your hands.
5. Heat oil in a large skillet over medium heat. When hot, carefully place the cornmeal pancakes in the skillet.
6. Cook for 2-3 minutes on each side until golden brown and crispy.
7. Remove the pancakes from the skillet and transfer to a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
8. Serve the shrimp with cornmeal pancakes hot, garnished with additional sour cream if desired.
